notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with working aliens, shields, UFO, scoring, lives, and audio, but has a 'WAITING' pState bug that breaks wave transitions (buildWave called via setTimeout while pState is stuck), and minor shield collision detection inconsistencies.

Solid Space Invaders presentation and basic controls work, but progression/state handling is flawed (next-wave uses a dummy WAITING state and Enter from game over returns to title instead of restarting), keeping it from being fully functional.
